Enum Class PIIType

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<PIIType>
com.semanticprivacyguard.model.PIIType
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<PIIType>, Constable
public enum PIIType extends Enum<PIIType>
Enumeration of all PII (Personally Identifiable Information) types that Semantic Privacy Guard can detect and redact.

Each type carries a human-readable label used when generating tokens and reports. Types are ordered roughly from highest (most damaging if leaked) to lowest sensitivity so that callers can apply threshold-based filtering.

Since:
1.0.0
Author:
Hemant Naik

  • Enum Constant Summary

    Enum Constants
    Enum Constant
    Description
    ADDRESS
    Physical street address.
    API_KEY
    API key, OAuth token, JWT, or similar bearer credential.
    BANK_ACCOUNT
    Bank account or routing number.
    COORDINATES
    GPS / geolocation coordinates.
    CREDIT_CARD
    Payment card number validated by the Luhn algorithm.
    DATE_OF_BIRTH
    Date of birth.
    EMAIL
    Personal or corporate email address.
    GENERIC_PII
    Catch-all for generic sensitive tokens that do not fit a specific type but were flagged by the ML classifier with sufficient confidence.
    GOVERNMENT_ID
    Passport, driver's licence, or national ID number.
    IP_ADDRESS
    IPv4 or IPv6 address.
    MEDICAL_RECORD
    Medical record number, diagnosis code, or HIPAA-protected identifier.
    ORGANIZATION
    Organisation or company name detected via ML.
    PASSWORD
    Password or passphrase literal appearing in plaintext.
    PERSON_NAME
    Full name detected via ML context classifier.
    PHONE
    Phone number in any common format.
    SSN
    US Social Security Number (e.g.

  • Method Details

    • values

      public static PIIType[] values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
      Returns:
      an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared

    • valueOf

      public static PIIType valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null

    • getLabel

      public String getLabel()
      Returns the short label used inside replacement tokens.

    • getSeverity

      public int getSeverity()
      Returns the severity score (1–10).
